# Vendor architecture icon notice

AWS assets were selected from the official AWS Architecture
Icons package using exact architecture service icon names.

AppleDouble files under `__MACOSX` and files beginning with
`._` are explicitly rejected.

## AWS selected assets

- `lambda.png` from `Arch_AWS-Lambda_64.svg`; 160x160; SHA-256 `b1b75b448cd5eb8deed386b40265e5e2b3cfe74ecd5aab1ff0b7412c70e43b8f`.
- `api-gateway.png` from `Arch_Amazon-API-Gateway_64.svg`; 160x160; SHA-256 `a568aaddfaa5f8039c5fae9219ccafbfec5e7ad1cec24d1f3714d0b4033b59f1`.
- `dynamodb.png` from `Arch_Amazon-DynamoDB_64.svg`; 160x160; SHA-256 `a9f836cf875f0e1f0eb21743d7d2ac2ef3dc2f226f17592da3f602dbc0425221`.
- `cloudwatch.png` from `Arch_Amazon-CloudWatch_64.svg`; 160x160; SHA-256 `4d2ffe2734492390da291c4e2e27ae528554a2968b25117fedb3dc240fd71659`.
- `ecr.png` from `Arch_Amazon-Elastic-Container-Registry_64.svg`; 160x160; SHA-256 `1dc9a42fb8c9964ab939f3c7f25b50f402367f0b83fe1f07834820747848cd57`.
- `certificate-manager.png` from `Arch_AWS-Certificate-Manager_64.svg`; 160x160; SHA-256 `4cd3430cef47f5d8b76ebb6317c742a3abbe98c66233269ab2df80128ed7e6f1`.
- `bedrock.png` from `Arch_Amazon-Bedrock_64.svg`; 160x160; SHA-256 `0f59e2eb7ef4e980d20e65dcf3b8e922786579c0991423c93aa288a5cbab2fa5`.
- `s3.png` from `Arch_Amazon-Simple-Storage-Service_64.svg`; 160x160; SHA-256 `3c8b14e7888280db5ac613d7782a32a5c01a8689364b4edeb5ac9278ed171fe8`.

The service marks are not recolored.
